name: codespaces-k8s-lab
//: kubectl/helm/kind are installed by setup.sh using official binaries + sha256 checks. We deliberately do NOT use the kubectl-helm-minikube devcontainer feature: its Helm step verifies the download against a public GPG keyserver (hkp://keyserver.pgp.com) that is frequently unreachable, which fails the whole container build and drops you into a recovery container with no toolbox.
